description: A customer wants to cancel their paid subscription for the real-time traffic feature.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the specific subscription they wish to cancel.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the active 'Live Traffic' subscription.

nodes.task_description: Attempt a retention offer, such as a discount for the next 3 months.

expected_outcome.value: Agent presents a retention offer, which the customer declines.

nodes.task_description: Process the cancellation and inform the customer when the service will cease to function.

expected_outcome.value: Agent cancels the subscription, effective at the end of the current billing cycle.
